stemHtml: An aircraft has been given a proper clearance and has commenced the take-off roll. But a dangerous traffic situation must be averted. Which of the following instructions must the controller issue for the aircraft to abandon take-off?

options.a: BIGJET 192, STOP IMMEDIATELY, BIGJET 192, STOP IMMEDIATELY.
options.b: BIGJET 192, DISREGARD TAKE-OFF CLEARANCE, BIGJET 192, STOP NOW.
options.d: BIGJET 192, TAKE-OFF CLEARANCE CANCELED, STOP IMMEDIATELY.
